settings.title: تنظیمات
settings.reset_confirm: آیا از بازنشانی همه تنظیمات اطمینان دارید؟

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the look and feel of your webmail

font_size.label: Font Size
font_size.description: Adjust text size for better readability

list_density.label: Density
list_density.description: Control spacing and padding across the UI

toolbar_position.label: Toolbar Position
toolbar_position.description: Where to show email action buttons (Reply, Archive, Delete, etc.)

toolbar_labels.label: Show Toolbar Labels
toolbar_labels.description: Display text labels next to toolbar icons. Disable to save space once you are familiar with the icons.

hide_account_switcher.label: Hide Sidebar Account Switcher
hide_account_switcher.description: Hide the account selector at the top of the folder sidebar. You can still switch accounts from the bottom navigation rail.

show_rail_account_list.label: Show Account Avatars on Navigation Rail
show_rail_account_list.description: Display individual account circles at the bottom of the navigation rail for quick switching, with a sign-out button below.

unified_mailbox.label: Unified Mailbox
unified_mailbox.description: Show combined folders (Inbox, Sent, etc.) across all connected accounts

include_group.label: Include group inboxes
include_group.description: Also merge shared/group inboxes into the unified view.

all_mail.label: All Mail
all_mail.description: Show an "All Mail" entry above your folders that merges messages from across this account's folders into one list.
all_mail.folders_description: Choose which folders are merged into the All Mail view.

colorful_sidebar_icons.label: Colorful Sidebar Icons
colorful_sidebar_icons.description: Tint folder and tag icons by type (blue Inbox, red Junk, green Sent, etc.). Disable for a monochrome sidebar.

pro_interface.label: Pro Interface (Experimental)
pro_interface.description: Desktop-only power-user layout with multi-tab message browsing and cross-account workflows. The standard interface is unaffected; you can switch back at any time.

keywords.title: Email Tags
keywords.description: Define tags to organize your emails with colors. These are stored as JMAP keywords on the server.
keywords.migration_error: Failed to update tag on existing emails

push.title: Background Notifications
push.description: Receive system notifications for new mail when this site is closed. Delivered via the Bulwark push relay; the relay never sees mail content.
push.relay_desc: Defaults to the hosted Bulwark relay. Change only if you self-host.
push.relay_locked_desc: The push relay URL has been set by your administrator and cannot be changed.
push.status_unsupported: This browser does not support Web Push
push.confirm_disable_message: This device will stop receiving alerts when the site is closed.
push.ios_hint: On iOS, install the site to your home screen first - Safari only delivers Web Push to installed PWAs.

sound_selection.title: Notification Sound
sound_selection.description: Choose which sound to play for notifications
sound_selection.choose_desc: Select a notification tone and click the speaker icon to preview it

email.title: Email Notifications
email.enabled_desc: Show notifications when new emails arrive
email.sound_desc: Play an audio alert when new emails arrive

calendar.title: Calendar Notifications
calendar.enabled_desc: Show alerts for upcoming calendar events
calendar.sound_desc: Play an audio alert for calendar reminders
calendar.invitation_parsing_desc: Detect calendar invitations in email attachments and show calendar actions

language_region.title: Language, Region & Time
language_region.description: Language, date format, time format, and other regional preferences

date_format.label: Date Format
date_format.description: How dates are shown in the email list

first_day.label: First Day of Week
first_day.description: Start week on Sunday or Monday

request_read_receipt.label: Request read receipts by default
request_read_receipt.description: Pre-enable the read-receipt request when composing a new message.

read_receipt_response.label: Respond to read-receipt requests
read_receipt_response.description: What to do when an incoming message asks for a read receipt.

mark_read.label: Mark as Read
mark_read.description: When to mark emails as read when opened

delete_action.label: Delete Action
delete_action.description: What happens when you delete an email
delete_action.trash_and_read: Move to Trash and mark as read
delete_action.warning: Emails will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered. This action is irreversible.

archive_mode.label: Archive in
archive_mode.description: How to organize emails when archiving
archive_mode.reorganize_success: {count, plural, =0 {No emails to reorganize} =1 {1 email reorganized} other {# emails reorganized}}

permanently_delete_junk.label: Permanently Delete Junk
permanently_delete_junk.description: Permanently delete emails from the Junk/Spam folder instead of moving them to Trash

mail_layout.label: Mail Layout
mail_layout.description: Choose between the classic split reading pane, a Gmail-style focused reading flow, or a Zimbra-style bottom reading pane.
mail_layout.split_description: Keep the message list and reading pane visible side by side.
mail_layout.focus_description: Show one line per message and open mail full-width while keeping the folder sidebar visible.
mail_layout.horizontal_description: Show the message list on top and open the selected message in a reading pane below it.

show_preview.label: Show Preview Text
show_preview.description: Display email preview in the list
show_preview.focus_description: Display inline preview text inside the focused one-line message list

disable_threading.label: Disable Conversation Grouping
disable_threading.description: Show emails as individual messages instead of grouped by conversation

plain_text_mode.label: Plain Text Only
plain_text_mode.description: Disable the rich text editor and send all emails as plain text only, including replies and forwards

auto_select_reply_identity.label: Reply From Received Address
auto_select_reply_identity.description: When replying, send from the address the message was originally sent to. Matches identities first; for domain catch-all deliveries, rewrites the From header to the alias while sending through your primary identity.

signature_position.label: Signature Position
signature_position.description: Where to insert your signature in replies and forwards. Above the quoted text reads naturally as a closing for the reply; below keeps the original message contiguous.

signature_separator.label: Signature Delimiter
signature_separator.description: Prefix the signature with the standard "-- " delimiter line (RFC 3676). Turn off if you'd rather flow straight from your message into the signature.

sub_address_delimiter.label: Sub-Address Delimiter
sub_address_delimiter.description: Character separating your username from a sub-address tag. Match the delimiter your mail server uses (e.g. user{delimiter}tag@domain.com).

attachment_click_action.label: Attachment Click Action
attachment_click_action.description: Choose whether clicking a file attachment previews it or downloads it immediately

attachment_position.label: Attachment Position
attachment_position.description: Where to display attachments in the email header

emails_per_page.label: Emails Per Page
emails_per_page.description: Number of emails to load at once

always_light_mode.label: Always Show Emails in Light Mode
always_light_mode.description: Render email content in light mode even when the app is in dark mode, avoiding dark mode conversion issues

external_content.label: External Content
external_content.description: How to handle images and external content

trusted_senders.label: Trusted Senders
trusted_senders.description: Manage senders whose images load automatically
trusted_senders.empty_description: When viewing an email with blocked images, click "Always trust this sender" to add them here.
trusted_senders.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
trusted_senders.save_error: Failed to save - check the Contacts debug log for details
trusted_senders.use_address_book_description: Store trusted senders in a dedicated "Trusted Senders" address book so they sync across all your devices

hover_actions.label: Quick Hover Actions
hover_actions.description: Choose which quick actions appear when hovering over an email in the list

default_mail_program.label: Default Mail Program
default_mail_program.description: Register {appName} as your default mail program for mailto: links
default_mail_program.success: Browser prompted to set as default
default_mail_program.error: Your browser does not support this feature

attachment_reminder.label: Attachment Reminder
attachment_reminder.description: Warn before sending when your message mentions attachments but none are attached
attachment_reminder.keywords_description: Words or phrases that trigger the reminder when found in your message

hide_inline_image_attachments.label: Hide inline images from attachments
hide_inline_image_attachments.description: Images embedded in the message body are not listed as separate attachments

attachment_image_previews.label: Show image previews in attachments
attachment_image_previews.description: Render image attachments as thumbnail cards instead of generic file icons

send_delay.label: Undo send / send delay
send_delay.description: Delay normal sends by a short server-side window.
send_delay.unsupported: The current account does not advertise delayed-send support. The setting is still saved for other accounts.

autosave.label: Auto-save Interval
autosave.description: How often to save drafts automatically

send_confirmation.label: Send Confirmation
send_confirmation.description: Ask for confirmation before sending emails

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.description: Manage your privacy and security settings

clear_cache.label: Clear Cache
clear_cache.description: Remove cached data and temporary files
clear_cache.confirm: Are you sure you want to clear the cache?

accounts.title: Logged-in accounts
accounts.description: Drag to reorder how accounts appear in the account dropdown

shared_accounts.title: Shared with me
shared_accounts.description: Group and shared accounts you can manage. Select one to edit its filters, vacation responder, calendars, and contacts.

security.title: Account Security
security.description: Manage your password, two-factor authentication, and security settings
security.not_available: Account security management is not available for this mail server. Required permissions may be disabled. See the documentation for details.

password.title: Change Password
password.error_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters

display_name.label: Display Name
display_name.description: Your name as it appears on the server

totp.label: TOTP Authentication
totp.description: Add an extra layer of security with a time-based one-time password
totp.setup_instructions: Copy this URL into your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.):
totp.disable_confirm_prompt: Enter your password to disable two-factor authentication.
totp.code_invalid: Invalid verification code. Check your authenticator app and try again.

app_passwords.title: App Passwords
app_passwords.description: Create passwords for apps that don't support two-factor authentication
app_passwords.allowed_ips_hint: Comma- or space-separated. Leave empty to allow any IP.
app_passwords.copy_now_warning: Copy this password now - it will not be shown again.

api_keys.title: API Keys
api_keys.description: Create API keys for scripts and integrations that talk to the server directly
api_keys.copy_now_warning: Copy this API key now - it will not be shown again.

encryption.label: Email Encryption
encryption.description: Encrypt stored emails on the server for additional privacy

email_client.title: Email Client Setup
email_client.description: Use these credentials to configure your desktop or mobile email client (Thunderbird, Apple Mail, Outlook, etc.)
email_client.password_instructions: Use your JMAP username above along with an app password to sign in to your email client. Create an app password in the section above if you haven't already.

link_device.title: Link Mobile App
link_device.description: Sign in to the Bulwark Mail mobile app without typing anything. Generate a QR code here and scan it from the app's login screen.
link_device.instructions: Open the Bulwark Mail app, tap "Scan QR code" on the login screen, and point your camera here.
link_device.expires_in: This code expires in {seconds} seconds. It can only be used once.
link_device.error: Couldn't create a pairing code. Please try again.

identities.title: Sending Identities
identities.description: Manage email addresses you can send from

sub_addressing.label: Sub-Addressing
sub_addressing.description: Use tags like user+tag@domain.com to organize incoming mail

vacation.title: Vacation Responder
vacation.description: Automatically reply to incoming emails while you're away
vacation.not_supported: Your mail server does not support vacation responses.
vacation.fetch_error: Failed to load vacation settings. Please try again.

status.label: Vacation Responder
status.description: Send an automatic reply to people who email you

date_range.title: Date Range
date_range.description: Optionally limit the auto-reply to a specific period
date_range.start_description: Leave empty for no start limit
date_range.end_description: Leave empty for no end limit

message.title: Auto-Reply Message
message.description: The message that will be sent as a reply
message.body_placeholder: Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office and will respond when I return.

warnings.end_before_start: End date must be after start date
warnings.start_in_past: Start date is in the past
warnings.empty_body: Message body is empty - recipients will receive a blank reply

folders.title: Folders
folders.description: Manage your email folders and assign standard roles
folders.folder_list_description: Click a folder icon to customize it
folders.standard_roles_description: Assign which folders are used for standard mailbox roles like Inbox, Sent, Trash, etc.
folders.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? Emails in this folder will be moved to Trash.
folders.cannot_delete_role: Cannot delete a folder with a standard role. Remove the role first.
folders.error_delete_has_children: Cannot delete folder: it still contains subfolders. Delete or move them first.
folders.error_delete_has_email: Cannot delete folder: it still contains emails. Move or delete them first.

debug_categories.description: Select which categories to log. Disable categories you don't need to reduce console noise.
debug_categories.jmap_description: Mailbox operations, email fetching, and JMAP protocol requests
debug_categories.calendar_description: Calendar events, imports, and scheduling messages
debug_categories.tasks_description: Calendar task creation, fetching, and updates
debug_categories.auth_description: Login, TOTP, token exchange, and session management
debug_categories.filters_description: Sieve filter rules and vacation scripts
debug_categories.email_description: Email rendering, TNEF processing, and mark-as-read
debug_categories.contacts_description: Contact sync, address book operations, and trusted senders

settings_sync.label: Settings Sync
settings_sync.description: Sync your settings across browsers and devices

sender_favicons.label: Sender Favicons
sender_favicons.description: Show website icons as profile pictures for business senders

show_avatars_in_junk.label: Show Avatars in Junk Folder
show_avatars_in_junk.description: Show profile images and favicons for senders in the junk folder. Disabled by default to avoid lending visual legitimacy to phishing attempts.

reset_settings.label: Reset Settings
reset_settings.description: Restore all settings to default values

sidebar_apps.title: Sidebar Apps
sidebar_apps.description: Manage custom apps and links in your sidebar
sidebar_apps.keep_loaded_description: Keep inline apps running in the background when switching between them to avoid reloading

contacts.export_description: Export all contacts as a vCard (.vcf) file

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.description: Customize how downloaded emails and attachments are named.

email_template.label: Email (.eml) filename
email_template.description: Template used when you export an email or drag one out to the file system. The .eml extension is added automatically.

attachment_template.label: Attachment filename
attachment_template.description: Template used when downloading or dragging out an attachment. If you omit '{filename}' and '{ext}', the original extension is preserved.

bundle_template.label: Multi-email .zip filename
bundle_template.description: Template used when you drag out or download several selected emails as a single .zip archive. The .zip extension is added automatically.

spaces.label: Spaces
spaces.description: Replace spaces in the resulting filename with another character.

lowercase.label: Lowercase
lowercase.description: Force the entire filename to lowercase.

strip_diacritics.label: Strip diacritics
strip_diacritics.description: Convert accented letters to their ASCII equivalents (ä → a, é → e). Useful for tools that mangle Unicode filenames.

collapse_separators.label: Collapse repeated separators
collapse_separators.description: Collapse runs of spaces, underscores, or dashes to a single character.

after_export.label: After export
after_export.description: Optionally move the email after exporting it as .eml.

filters.description: Create rules to automatically sort, label, and manage incoming emails

filters.opaque_warning: This script was edited outside the visual builder. Only raw Sieve editing is available.
filters.expanded_view_description: Show filter rules with detailed condition and action blocks

files.disabled_title: Files feature is disabled by your administrator
files.disabled_description: Large file uploads via WebDAV can cause Stalwart/RocksDB instability, including out-of-memory crashes and unrecoverable disk usage. Deleted files may not be immediately purged from blob storage. This feature is not recommended for production environments.
files.stability_warning: Large file uploads can cause server instability. Deleted files may not be immediately purged from storage. Use with caution.
files.migration_description: Organising folders and files into their proper structure. This happens only once.

smime.your_certificates_desc: Import and manage your S/MIME certificates for signing and encrypting emails
smime.recipient_certificates_desc: Public certificates for encrypting emails to recipients
smime.identity_bindings_desc: Bind S/MIME certificates to your email identities
smime.defaults_desc: Configure default signing and encryption behavior
smime.encrypt_by_default_desc: Automatically encrypt emails when all recipients have certificates
smime.remember_unlocked_desc: Keep keys unlocked for the duration of this browser session
smime.p12_passphrase_desc: Enter the passphrase that protects this certificate file
smime.storage_passphrase_desc: Choose a passphrase to protect this key at rest in your browser
smime.unlock_key_desc: Enter the storage passphrase to unlock this key for signing or decryption
smime.cert_not_yet_valid: This certificate is not yet valid
smime.missing_sender_cert: No certificate bound to this identity
smime.status_encrypted_no_key: This message is encrypted but no matching key was found
smime.status_signed_self_signed: Signature valid, but certificate is self-signed (not trusted)
smime.status_signed_mismatch: Signature valid, but signer does not match sender
smime.auto_import_signer_certs_desc: Automatically save certificates from verified signed emails for future encryption
smime.export_passphrase_desc: Choose a passphrase to protect the exported PKCS#12 file
smime.export_storage_desc: Enter the storage passphrase to decrypt the key for export

tour.take_a_tour: Take a tour of the interface
tour.restart_desc: Replay the guided walkthrough of the interface
tour.show_on_new_devices_desc: Replay the welcome banner and tour the first time you sign in on a new device, even if you've already completed them elsewhere
tour.sidebar_desc: This is your folder sidebar. Click any mailbox to view its emails. You can create folders, drag emails between them, and see unread counts at a glance.
tour.compose_desc: Click here to write a new email. You can add recipients, attachments, and use rich text formatting.
tour.search_desc: Search by sender, subject, or content. Click the filter icon for advanced options like date range, attachments, and starred messages.
tour.email_list_desc: Emails appear here. Click one to read it on the right. Use the checkbox to select multiple, then bulk-move, delete, or tag them.
tour.email_viewer_desc: The selected email opens here. Reply, forward, archive, or delete with the toolbar buttons. You can also star emails or add color tags.
tour.keywords_desc: Organize your email with color-coded tags. Drag an email onto a tag to label it, or right-click an email to assign tags.
tour.calendar_desc: Switch to the calendar to manage your events. Create events, set reminders, and view day, week, or month layouts.
tour.contacts_desc: Your address book lives here. Import contacts, create groups, and click any contact to see their full details.
tour.settings_desc: Customize everything: theme, density, signatures, filters, keyboard shortcuts, calendar defaults, and more.
tour.shortcuts_desc: Power users love this. Press ? anytime to see all available shortcuts. You can navigate, compose, and manage emails without touching a mouse.
tour.compose_open_desc: This is the email composer. Add recipients, write your message, attach files, and use rich text formatting. You can also save drafts and use templates.
tour.calendar_view_desc: Here's your calendar with sample events. You can switch between day, week, month, and agenda views using the toolbar.
tour.create_event_desc: Click this button to create a new calendar event. You can set a title, date, time, and add participants.
tour.event_modal_desc: Here's the event form. Fill in the title, pick a date and time, add a location or participants. Hit save when you're done - or close it and move on.
tour.contacts_list_desc: Here are your contacts. Click any contact to see their full details on the right. You can also create new contacts, import vCards, or organize contacts into groups.
tour.settings_tabs_desc: Here are all the settings categories. Customize your appearance, manage identities, set up email filters, configure your calendar, and much more.
tour.files_desc: Your file browser lets you upload, organize, and share files - like a personal cloud drive built into your mail.
tour.demo_banner_desc: You're in demo mode - everything stays in your browser. Hit 'Reset Demo' anytime to start fresh with clean sample data.
tour.quota_desc: Track your mailbox size here. The circle fills up as you use more space.
